note: Market is selling off today on AI valuation fears (OpenAI IPO delay, broad tech weakness). Inflation remains well above the Fed's 2% target and the Fed is leaning hawkish — it removed its cut bias in June and indicated a hike is possible. The Shiller CAPE at 39.7 is structurally elevated. For a long-term quality investor with 0 holdings, this is not a panic moment, but it is not a bargain environment either. Demand the full margin of safety before any buy. Per our thesis data, AAPL trades at a -43% margin of safety (expensive), V at -14% (expensive), and MSFT at +2.6% (barely inside the threshold). No name meets our preferred margin today. Posture: cautious.
